ingredients.item:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (650 g) boneless, skinless chicken breasts (3 large breasts; or substitute boneless chicken thighs), cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes
1 teaspoon kosher salt
ingredients.original:
CHICKEN
1½ pounds (650 g) boneless, skinless chicken breasts (3 large breasts; or substitute boneless chicken thighs), cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes
1 teaspoon kosher salt

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon paprika
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon paprika

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon ground allspice
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon ground allspice

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon onion powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon onion powder

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon garlic powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon garlic powder

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided

ingredients.item:
TAHINI SAUCE
½ cup (90 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
½ cup (120 ml) tahini
ingredients.original:
TAHINI SAUCE
½ cup (90 ml) fresh lemon juice, plus more if needed
½ cup (120 ml) tahini

ingredients.item: 1 cup (240 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
ingredients.original: 1 cup (240 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt

ingredients.item: 7 large cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.original: 7 large cloves garlic, minced

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon garlic powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon garlic powder

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon onion powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon onion powder

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon olive oil
½ cup whole cashews (60 g), slivered almonds (55 g), or pine nuts (65 g)
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
1 tablespoon olive oil
½ cup whole cashews (60 g), slivered almonds (55 g), or pine nuts (65 g)

ingredients.item: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a large bowl, mix the chicken with the 1 teaspoon salt, paprika, pepper, allspice, onion powder, garlic powder, and 1 tablespoon of the oil until well combined. Set aside.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a large bowl, mix the chicken with the 1 teaspoon salt, paprika, pepper, allspice, onion powder, garlic powder, and 1 tablespoon of the oil until well combined. Set aside.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE TAHINI SAUCE: In a medium bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, tahini, yogurt, garlic, 1½ teaspoons salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder with ½ cup (120 ml) of water until the consistency is smooth.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE TAHINI SAUCE: In a medium bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, tahini, yogurt, garlic, 1½ teaspoons salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder with ½ cup (120 ml) of water until the consistency is smooth.

ingredients.item: 3 In a large skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat for 2 minutes. Add the chicken and sear it for 2 minutes on each side, or until lightly golden, working in batches to avoid overcrowding. Transfer to a plate. The chicken does not need to be fully cooked, as it will simmer in the sauce.
ingredients.original: 3 In a large skillet, heat the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat for 2 minutes. Add the chicken and sear it for 2 minutes on each side, or until lightly golden, working in batches to avoid overcrowding. Transfer to a plate. The chicken does not need to be fully cooked, as it will simmer in the sauce.

ingredients.item: 4 Place all the chicken back into the skillet, then pour the tahini sauce on top. Let the chicken and sauce simmer for 5 to 7 minutes, until the sauce is bubbling and the chicken is fully white on the inside. Taste and adjust for salt and/or lemon juice if needed.
ingredients.original: 4 Place all the chicken back into the skillet, then pour the tahini sauce on top. Let the chicken and sauce simmer for 5 to 7 minutes, until the sauce is bubbling and the chicken is fully white on the inside. Taste and adjust for salt and/or lemon juice if needed.

ingredients.item: 5 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE GARNISH: Heat the 1 tablespoon oil in a small skillet over low heat, then add the nuts and toast for 5 minutes, or until golden, stirring often.
ingredients.original: 5 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE GARNISH: Heat the 1 tablespoon oil in a small skillet over low heat, then add the nuts and toast for 5 minutes, or until golden, stirring often.

ingredients.item: 6 Garnish with the chopped parsley and toasted nuts and serve with rice and salad.
ingredients.original: 6 Garnish with the chopped parsley and toasted nuts and serve with rice and salad.
